title: It's not a personality, it's a personality disorder.
content:
It's not a personality, it's a personality disorder.

Eighty milligrams adderral, six milligrams alprazolam, one bottle chardonnay, two grain selzters make the Anthony get DUI.

My police officer cop buddy told me, “all the cool ones have mugshots. “

Upon my second apprehension by the police, the first words out of my slurring mouth: “I’m not drunk. I’m just very nervous.”
context: From document: It's not a personality, it's a personality disorder.
